items.title: Required backend env variables validated at startup
items.recommendation: Keep runtime fail-fast for required env and extend required list for production-only keys.

items.title: Deployment environment matrix documented
items.recommendation: Maintain a single source of truth for env separation and ownership.

items.title: Frontend env exposure restricted to safe VITE fields
items.recommendation: Continue avoiding secret exposure in frontend bundles and keep explicit validator policy.

items.title: Production deployment checklist exists
items.recommendation: Keep checklist aligned with current runtime and release process.

items.title: Checkout session route exists and is authenticated
items.recommendation: Keep authenticated checkout creation and package whitelisting.

items.title: Webhook endpoint and signature verification are implemented
items.recommendation: Do not launch paid flow without verified webhook signatures.

items.title: Credits are granted only on completed payment and guarded for duplicates
items.recommendation: Retain idempotent fulfillment and completed-event-only crediting.

items.title: Admin Stripe session visibility exists
items.recommendation: Ensure admin troubleshooting path remains available in production.

items.title: Test/live mode clarity documented
items.recommendation: Enforce key/source validation in CI to prevent test/live mixups.

items.title: JWT secret requirement enforced
items.recommendation: Continue mandatory JWT secret enforcement and rotate secrets per environment.

items.title: Cookie/session security settings are explicitly production-hardened
items.recommendation: Explicitly assert secure + strict cookie policy in auth cookie set paths for production.

items.title: Protected route and admin guard coverage exists
items.recommendation: Maintain route guard coverage for all sensitive endpoints and admin UI routes.

items.title: Rate limit policies are present on sensitive flows
items.recommendation: Expand coverage and ensure all auth/admin write endpoints are protected by throttling.

items.title: Cross-user data isolation indicators present in test/runbook evidence
items.recommendation: Keep automated ownership assertions in smoke tests and add explicit regression gates in CI.

items.title: Upload route exists with auth protection
items.recommendation: Retain auth-required upload and access controls for evidence documents.

items.title: File type and size controls are present
items.recommendation: Add malware scanning and stronger content validation before production scale.

items.title: Evidence source labeling policy exists
items.recommendation: Enforce source label completeness checks on upload/review lifecycle.

items.title: Sensitive data warning and retention policy are explicit
items.recommendation: Add explicit data retention/deletion and sensitive-material handling SOP for operations.

items.title: Core pages contain loading states
items.recommendation: Standardize loading UX coverage across all user/admin surfaces.

items.title: Core pages contain error fallback states
items.recommendation: Add explicit recoverable error messaging for remaining page-level API flows.

items.title: Core pages contain empty-state handling
items.recommendation: Add explicit empty-state UX for list, diagnostics, and evidence screens lacking guidance.

items.title: Health and buildinfo endpoints exist
items.recommendation: Keep health/build metadata endpoints wired for deployment diagnostics.

items.title: Admin runtime/deployment/observability pages and APIs exist
items.recommendation: Retain admin observability access and ensure endpoint health checks in release gates.

items.title: Audit log infrastructure exists with metadata sanitization
items.recommendation: Preserve sanitization and ensure retention/archival policy for audit logs.

items.title: Deployment-truth verification script exists
items.recommendation: Keep deployment-truth checks in release readiness pipelines.

items.title: Database backup strategy is documented
items.recommendation: Maintain documented RPO/RTO/ownership and execute recurring restore drills with recorded evidence.

items.title: File/document backup strategy is documented
items.recommendation: Keep restore path + retention/deletion policy enforced and validate integrity in recurring drills.

items.title: Restore and rollback procedures are documented
items.recommendation: Run and record periodic restore drills with measurable success criteria.

items.title: Pilot/support runbook exists
items.recommendation: Maintain on-call owner and escalation mapping per release.

items.title: Production email provider readiness is explicit
items.recommendation: Provider docs/verifier are in place; launch remains gated until real SMTP/provider + SPF/DKIM/DMARC setup is completed.

items.title: Incident response documentation exists
items.recommendation: Create incident response playbook with severity matrix and communication protocol.

items.title: Support/debug access boundaries documented
items.recommendation: Define who can access admin diagnostics and under what approval path.

items.title: Connector stack defaults to NOT_CONFIGURED for missing endpoints
items.recommendation: Retain fail-safe NOT_CONFIGURED behavior and avoid implicit activation.

items.title: Connector activation endpoints remain admin-protected and explicit
items.recommendation: Keep explicit activation workflow and legal approval gates.

items.title: AI chat is not introduced in current runtime
items.recommendation: Keep AI/chat features out of production scope unless explicitly planned and gated.

items.title: No unsupported automated e-Devlet or scraper/bot tooling in runtime scope
items.recommendation: Maintain manual-only governance for unsupported external sources.
